nasb.text: Twelve years they had served Chedorlaomer, but the thirteenth year they rebelled.

esv.text: Twelve years they had served Chedorlaomer, but in the thirteenth year they rebelled.

cnv.text: 他們服事了基大老瑪已經有十二年，到第十三年就背叛了。

ccb.text: 他们受基大老玛王统治十二年，在第十三年叛变了。

csbs.text: 这五王曾经服事了基大劳玛十二年，但在第十三年背叛了。
